site.name: ATELIER NORTH
site.description: The Silent Architect of Digital Luxury. Bespoke design and development for discerning global clients.

hero.title: The Silent Architect of Digital Luxury.
hero.imageAlt: Minimalist brutalist concrete architecture interior with dramatic light and shadow.

philosophy.title: We craft digital experiences for those who value the unspoken. In a world of noise, we find power in stillness, intentionality, and the surgical precision of design.
paragraphs: Our approach is rooted in the Silent Curator methodology. We don't just build interfaces; we curate atmospheres that resonate with high-discerning audiences.
By prioritizing negative space and scale contrast, we elevate brands from functional to aspirational, creating a digital legacy that endures.

cases.title: The Monolith Collective
cases.imageAlt: High-fashion editorial shot of a sculptural stone vase in a minimalist gallery.

cases.title: Aura Fragrances
cases.imageAlt: Luxury boutique interior with dark wood textures and warm accent lighting.

items.name: Brand Identity
items.description: Forging timeless visual signatures for legacy-driven organizations.

items.name: Digital Design
items.description: Cinematic interfaces that prioritize clarity and atmospheric depth.

items.name: Development
items.description: High-performance engineering that mirrors the precision of the design.

items.name: Luxury Strategy
items.description: Consultancy for brands navigating the high-end digital landscape.

testimonial.quote: Atelier North understands the luxury market like no other. They didn't just build a site; they created a digital sanctuary for our brand.
testimonial.author: Julianna Vercetti
